text:
I think there may be a mix-up — this is the start of our conversation, so I haven't given you any steps yet! 😊

I can see you're on the **Setup tab** for your Vercel site (example.vercel.app, scoring 68/100). 

**What are you trying to accomplish?** A few common paths:

1. **Deploy GEO files** (llms.txt, business.json, schema) to your site
2. **Set up the AI visibility proxy** for Vercel
3. **Check what's ready to implement** based on your audit recommendations

Let me know which, and I'll walk you through the steps clearly!
